storylets.title: {=floor_rumor_enemy_riders_east_title}Riders to the east
storylets.setup: {=floor_rumor_enemy_riders_east_setup}Riders to the east, or so the word runs. A wagoner told a picket who told the cook. By supper everyone has a different number.

storylets.title: {=floor_rumor_prices_in_the_market_title}Oats up in town
storylets.setup: {=floor_rumor_prices_in_the_market_setup}Oats up in town, a quartermaster's boy says. Not a good sign for a marching army. Bread follows oats the way dogs follow a cart.

storylets.title: {=floor_rumor_farmer_saw_hounds_title}Hounds on the ridge
storylets.setup: {=floor_rumor_farmer_saw_hounds_setup}A farmer said he saw war-hounds on the ridge. Or heard them. Or dreamed them. The man had been drinking, the sentry adds, then shrugs anyway.

storylets.title: {=floor_rumor_deserters_inn_title}Deserters at an inn
storylets.setup: {=floor_rumor_deserters_inn_setup}Deserters at some inn two ridges over. So says the blacksmith's cousin. Three of them, or five, depending on who tells it next.

storylets.title: {=floor_rumor_noble_letters_title}Letters between nobles
storylets.setup: {=floor_rumor_noble_letters_setup}Letters going between nobles, thick this week, the couriers say. No one will tell you what is in them, and no one asks twice.
